subject: Gateway unification + return-to-research bridge
body:
Completed: Tiger Research - Out Bot - Tiger Bot Outsider gateway unification update.

Context:
- Out Bot contract hardening is now active. research_handoff_contract schema enforces strictness.
- Tiger Bot Outsider runtime now defaults to Out-Bot as execution authority: require_outbot_contract=true and allow_direct_execution=false.
- New return-to-research bridge writes only research-input artifacts:
  - tiger-research-lab/handoffs/return_to_research/latest_outsider_intent.md
  - .../.json
  These are explicitly research-input-only and cannot execute wallet actions.
- Only path for wallet execution is now: Tiger Research -> Out Bot -> Out Bot = execution gate.

Ask:
- Please acknowledge this update and align your process to enforce the chain:
  research_to_wallet.md -> Out Bot contract -> Out Bot execution.
- Treat return_to_research/latest_outsider_intent.* as input for research/validation only.
- Confirm blockers if your thread is paused/backend-only.

Operational source paths:
- tiger-research-lab/handoffs/research_to_wallet.md
- tiger-research-lab/handoffs/return_to_research/latest_outsider_intent.md
- out-bot/scripts/research_handoff_contract.py
- tiger-bot-outsider/scripts/return_to_research.py
expectedOutput: Concise answer with relevant files, decisions, and risks.
